svg.text: Underpowered: the CI tells you everything
Same true effect, same drug — only sample size differs
Crosses MCID, null, AND harm threshold
Entire CI in benefit zone, past MCID
Both trials found the SAME point estimate (HR 0.82)
Both suggest benefit. But only the large trial PROVES it.
The small trial's CI is so wide it includes benefit, null, AND harm.

g.text: Why does sample size control CI width?

svg.text: To halve the CI width, you need ~4× the sample size (or events)
